name: candle
prompt:
Analyze this candlestick chart. Extract the OHLC values for each visible candle.

Return a JSON object with this exact structure:
{
  "symbol": "detected symbol or null",
  "displayType": "candlestick_chart",
  "candles": [{"open": 100.5, "high": 101.2, "low": 100.1, "close": 100.8, "timestamp": "HH:MM or date"}, ...],
  "timeframe": "1m|5m|15m|1h|1d|unknown",
  "priceRange": {"min": 100.0, "max": 102.0},
  "confidence": "high|medium|low",
  "notes": "any observations"
}

Rules:
- List candles from left (oldest) to right (newest)
- Extract exact OHLC values as readable from the chart
- Include timestamps if visible on x-axis
- Return ONLY the JSON object, no other text
